title: pinus muricata subsp. stantonii
intro: Pinus muricata subsp. stantonii, also known as the Monterey pine variant or Pinus stantonii, is a subspecies of pine tree native to the Channel Islands of California. The needles of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pinus muricata subsp. stantonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
